peer_exemplars.reasoning: High libertarian anti-censorship orientation (68.92) and skepticism of state control (74.04) create moderate support for transparency as a check on platform power, but very low agreeableness (0.61) and high authoritarian law-and-order preference (81.36) temper enthusiasm for mandated disclosure.
